dataStatusDefinitions.verified: publishedAt + entryPriceUsd + btcAtPub + article-asset mapping all confirmed by team
dataStatusDefinitions.sourced: btcAtPub verified; entryPriceUsd from article snapshot or fixed backup — mismatch possible
dataStatusDefinitions.reference_only: price discrepancy unresolved OR not on Binance with verifiedAt null — display only, never aggregate
